growth-orchestrator.description: Growth Orchestrator Agent — coordinates all 8 Phase 1 growth agents, sequences the content pipeline (keyword brief → draft → review → publish → distribute), monitors 35+ growth KPIs, detects pipeline bottlenecks, and escalates blockers to chief-of-staff.

seo-lead.name: seo-lead
seo-lead.description: SEO Lead Agent — coordinates seo-intelligence, nationwide-seo-engine, and local-seo-domination into a unified search strategy. Tier 2 domain lead for the Wheeler Growth Engine SEO domain.

content-lead.name: content-lead
content-lead.description: Content Lead Agent — coordinates content-authority-engine and autonomous-docs. Tier 2 domain lead managing the content pipeline from brief to publish with legal review gate enforcement.

conversion-lead.name: conversion-lead
conversion-lead.description: Conversion Lead Agent — coordinates distribution-systems-architecture, forecasting-intelligence, and trend-forecasting. Tier 2 domain lead optimizing traffic-to-revenue conversion across 8 distribution channels.
